Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.iam.model

Class IamActions

java.lang.Object
com.salesforce.multicloudj.iam.model.IamActions
public final class IamActions extends Object
Pre-defined IAM service actions for IAM policies.

These constants represent common IAM operations that can be used in policy statements across AWS IAM, GCP IAM, and other cloud providers.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Action
    ALL
    Wildcard action representing all IAM operations
    static final Action
    ASSUME_ROLE
    Action to assume a role (for cross-account or service access)
    static final Action
    ATTACH_ROLE_POLICY
    Action to attach a policy to a role
    static final Action

    Action to create a new IAM role
    static final Action
    DELETE_ROLE
    Action to delete an IAM role
    static final Action
    DETACH_ROLE_POLICY
    Action to detach a policy from a role
    static final Action
    GET_ROLE
    Action to get details of an IAM role
    static final Action
    GET_ROLE_POLICY
    Action to get an inline role policy
    static final Action
    PUT_ROLE_POLICY
    Action to create/update an inline role policy
